Video.summary: An abandoned barn rests on a forest's edge.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Days Gone By

Video.title: Winter Paradise

Video.title: Tranquil Dawn

Video.title: Quiet Mountain River

Video.title: Mountain in an Oval

Video.summary: Bob Ross offers tips and shares painting techniques.

Video.title: Valley View

Video.summary: Bob paints a quiet brook in a forest.

Video.title: Serenity

Video.summary: Sea waters thunder and mist against cliffs.

Video.title: Cliffside

Video.title: Royal Majesty

Video.title: Autumn Fantasy

Video.summary: Icy mountains withstand winter's rigors.

Video.title: Winter Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain scene in a faux matte.

Video.title: Divine Elegance

Video.summary: Bob creates a tranquil landscape.

Video.title: Soft Mountain Glow

Video.title: Change of Seasons

Video.summary: Bob paints a hazy forest scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hazy Day

Video.summary: Bob paints a rickety forest shack.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hidden Delight

Video.summary: Bob overlaps summer and winter on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Double Take

Video.summary: Bob paints a waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wilderness Falls

Video.summary: Bob paints a scene with sun and shadows.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunlight in the Shadows

Video.summary: In the midst of the forest flows a stream that splashes and trickles endlessly along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints a lush island.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Island Paradise

Video.summary: Bob paints a snow scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Splendor of a Snowy Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints a beautiful summer getaway with rugged brown peaks, clear blue waters and a cozy little cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Retreat

Video.summary: Beautiful foliage and fierce skies with an almighty mountain overlooking a calm lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Final Grace

Video.summary: Bob paints flowers at sunrise.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Daisies at Dawn

Video.summary: Breathtaking skies, bending palms and waves that accentuate the cool night breeze.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Blue Moon

Video.summary: Bob paints a forest in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rustic Winter Woods

Video.summary: Bob paints a breathtaking scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: A Spectacular View

Video.summary: Bob paints a river in the woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Forest River

Video.summary: Bob paints a sunrise scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Daybreak

Video.summary: Bob paints a farm in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter at the Farm

Video.summary: Bob demonstrates a new painting medium.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain at Sunset

Video.summary: A gentle breeze sways palm trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Tropical Seascape

Video.summary: A bubbling stream, a distant waterfall and tumultuous skies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black Waterfall

Video.summary: Truly picture perfect; a bright day and still water combine to make amazing mirrored images throughout this Bob Ross mountain masterpiece.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Reflections

Video.summary: Warm summer mountain water and luxurious green grass.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Brown Mountain

Video.summary: An approaching storm and dramatic sky set the mood for this unique seascape, painted half black and half white.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black & White Seascape

Video.summary: A wondrous plush green forest where an almost invisible mountain overlooks a falling stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Waterfall

Video.summary: A bright green grassy forest, where a smooth crystal waterway flows so, so quietly.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lazy River

Video.summary: Bob paints a warm winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Pastel Winter
